## What principle or operation this card encodes

<!-- One paragraph. -->

## Domain

<!-- e.g. physics-condensed-matter, chemistry-electrochemistry, climate-radiative -->

## Kind

- [ ] `principle` — a peer-recognisable scientific law or relation
- [ ] `ops` — a parameterised computational protocol (SLURM, Snakemake, etc.)
- [ ] `hypothesis` — a proposed extension to the corpus, awaiting verification

## Canonical reference

<!-- Textbook, paper, official documentation that defines this principle. -->

## Dimensional structure (for principle cards)

<!-- Quantities + their SI dimensions. -->

## Expected limits / asymptotes

## Validation envelope

<!-- A small concrete example with input → expected output you'd like the engine to check. -->
